scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm -r --filter !./artifacts/desktop --if-present run build
scripts.desktop:check: pnpm --filter @workspace/sentinel run typecheck && echo 'Frontend TypeScript OK. Rust: cd artifacts/desktop && cargo check (requires Rust toolchain on macOS).'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
